hypothesis: If neural network Bayesian Algorithm Execution (NN-BAX) is applied to nudged elastic band calculations by iteratively fine-tuning a pre-trained equivariant graph neural network foundation model using strategically acquired points along predicted minimum energy paths, then it will converge to accurate transition state pathways with significantly fewer expensive simulator evaluations than standard NEB calculations, because the surrogate model learns to approximate the potential energy surface in the relevant configuration space through targeted sequential data acquisition rather than exhaustive sampling.
